mapper.select: SELECT t.id AS trainerId, u.name AS trainerName FROM TRAINER t JOIN `USER` u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.gym_id = #{value} ORDER BY u.name

SELECT ps.id AS id, ps.trainer_id AS trainerId, trainer_user.name AS trainerName, ps.client_id AS clientId, client_user.name AS clientName, DATE_FORMAT(ps.start_time, '%H:%i') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(ps.end_time, '%H:%i') AS endTime, ps.status AS status, HOUR(ps.start_time) AS startHour, WEEKDAY(ps.lesson_date) + 1 AS dayOfWeek, '' AS specialization FROM LESSON ps JOIN TRAINER t ON ps.trainer_id = t.id JOIN `USER` trainer_user ON t.user_id = trainer_user.id JOIN MEMBER m ON ps.client_id = m.id JOIN `USER` client_user ON m.user_id = client_user.id WHERE t.gym_id = #{gymId} AND ps.lesson_date >= #{weekStart} AND ps.lesson_date < #{weekEnd} GROUP BY ps.id, ps.trainer_id, trainer_user.name, ps.client_id, client_user.name, ps.start_time, ps.end_time, ps.status, ps.lesson_date ORDER BY ps.lesson_date ASC, ps.start_time ASC
